metadata.title: On The Radio
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.51] Someone found a letter you wrote me on the radio
[00:21.96] 
[00:24.33] And they told the world just how you felt
[00:28.89] 
[00:31.07] It must have fallen out of a hole in your old brown overcoat
[00:38.55] They never said your name, but I knew just who they meant
[00:44.62] Whoa-oh-oh-oh
[00:46.62] I was so surprised and shocked, and I wondered, too
[00:53.98] If, by chance, you heard it for yourself
[01:00.99] I never told a soul just how I've been feeling over you
[01:08.20] But they said it really loud, they said it on the air
[01:12.03] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[01:15.56] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[01:19.36] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[01:23.09] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[01:27.02] Now, now, don't it kinda strike you sad when you hear our song?
[01:35.18] Things are not the same since we broke up last June
[01:42.18] The only thing that I wanna hear is that you love me still
[01:49.76] And that you think you'll be comin' home real soon
[01:55.43] Whoa-oh-oh-oh
[01:57.73] Yeah, it kinda made me feel proud when I heard him say
[02:04.84] You couldn't find the words to say it yourself
[02:10.04] 
[02:12.17] And now in my heart, I know I can say what I really feel
[02:19.46] 'Cause they said it really loud, they said it on the air
[02:23.19] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[02:26.78] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[02:30.34] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[02:33.96] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[02:39.70] On the radio
[02:42.91] 
[03:18.47] If you think that love isn't found on the radio
[03:23.40] 
[03:25.48] Then tune right in, you may find the love you lost
[03:30.17] 
[03:32.41] 'Cause now I'm sitting here with the man I sent away long ago
[03:39.97] It sounded really loud, he said it really loud
[03:43.60] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[03:47.15] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[03:50.94] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[03:54.85] On the radio, whoa-oh-oh-oh
[03:58.77] On the radio
[03:59.47]
